falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average for three consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the unknown verdict by showing clear breakout momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate extreme market pressure, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and proving the unknown verdict incorrect

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity drops below 50% by the end of the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the bottom_2024_aug pattern would invalidate the current analysis, proving the unknown verdict was based on an incorrect pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
